name: Cordless Drill
description: 18V cordless drill with two batteries, charger, and a set of bits. Great for anything from hanging shelves to deck screws.

name: Electric Pressure Washer
description: 1800 PSI electric pressure washer, comes with three nozzle tips and a soap reservoir. Good for driveways, decks, and siding.

name: 24ft Extension Ladder
description: Aluminum extension ladder, extends to 24 feet. Rated for 250 lbs. Two-person carry recommended.

name: Canon DSLR Camera Kit
description: Canon EOS body with 18-55mm and 50mm prime lenses, extra battery, and a shoulder bag.

name: Portable Projector
description: 1080p mini projector with HDMI and built-in speaker. Comes with a travel case and a small tripod stand.

name: 4-Person Camping Tent
description: Dome tent, sets up in about 10 minutes. Includes rainfly and footprint. Comfortably fits 4 with gear.

name: Two-Burner Camp Stove
description: Propane camp stove with two burners. Propane canister not included.

name: Catan (Board Game)
description: Classic Settlers of Catan, base game. All pieces accounted for, checked after every return.

name: Carpet Cleaner Machine
description: Upright carpet and upholstery cleaner. Bring your own solution or ask for a top-up.
